issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing mainly on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: playbook-with-template-and-handler
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits starting/enabling Nginx; Response B provides no content.

scenarios.name: dynamic-aws-inventory-setup
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A omits key elements such as the correct filters, keyed_groups, and compose syntax.
